title: Folding bicycle
abstract: The present invention provides a folding bicycle comprising a front crossbar and a rear crossbar separated by a crossbar hinge, the front crossbar comprising a space, a front edge and a distal edge, wherein a front internal height of the front crossbar is shorter than an average internal height of the front crossbar. Further embodiments of the folding bicycle are disclosed herein.
claims: Claims 1. A folding bicycle comprising a front crossbar and a rear crossbar separated by a crossbar hinge, the front crossbar comprising a space, a front edge and a distal edge, wherein a front internal height of the front crossbar is shorter than an average internal height of the front crossbar. 2. The folding bicycle of claim 1 , wherein the front crossbar further comprises an opening at the distal edge of the front crossbar, wherein the opening is configured to allow insertion of at least one item into the front crossbar. 3. The folding bicycle of claim 2, wherein the item is a battery configured to provide power for operating the folding bicycle. 4. The folding bicycle of claim 3, wherein the battery is made as one piece. 5. The folding bicycle of claim 4, wherein the battery is rigid. 6. The folding bicycle of claim 5, wherein the space of the front crossbar allows insertion of the battery into the space of the front crossbar in a manner that an edge of the battery is positioned adjacent to the front edge of the front crossbar. 7. The folding bicycle of claim 1, wherein the front internal height of the front crossbar is shorter than the average internal height of a part of the front crossbar that is configured to store at least one item. 8. The folding bicycle of claim 7, wherein the item is a battery configured to provide power for operating the folding bicycle. 9. The folding bicycle of claim 8, wherein the battery is made as one piece. 10. The folding bicycle of claim 9, wherein the battery is rigid.
